data.title: BlackRock COO: AI-powered trading demonstrates the "creativity" of financial engineering
data.description: BlackRock's Chief Operating Officer stated that AI-powered trading demonstrates the "creativity" of financial engineering. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bloomberg: Bitcoin futures-spot price spread narrows, signaling the end of the Wall Street arbitrage era.
data.description: A key arbitrage trade in the cryptocurrency derivatives market is crumbling. The "cash-and-carry trade" strategy, where Wall Street institutions previously bought spot Bitcoin and sold futures to capture the price difference, has seen its annualized return plummet from approximately 17% a year ago to around 4.7% currently, barely covering funding costs, due to a massive influx of funds causing the spread to narrow sharply. As arbitrage profits shrink, the value of open interest in Bitcoin futures contracts on the Chicago Mercantile Exchange has fallen significantly from its peak and has been overtaken by Binance. This primarily reflects a strategic retreat by large US accounts such as hedge funds. Market maturity has given institutions more tools to express directional views, leading to narrowing spreads between exchanges and naturally squeezing arbitrage opportunities. Market analysts point out that the era of near-risk-free, high-return trades may be over, and traders are turning to more complex strategies in decentralized markets. CME Group stated that institutional investors are diversifying from Bitcoin to other tokens such as Ethereum. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Bitget launches new contract coin promotions for FRAX, FOGO, and FUN.
data.description: Bitget is launching a new contract trading event for FRAX, FOGO, and FUN, open to both new and existing users. Completing tasks such as your first contract trade, daily trades, and cumulative trading volume will unlock a specific number of blind box rewards. Furthermore, all users ranking in the top 1,000 by trading volume and accumulating over 10,000 USDT in trading volume will collectively unlock 20,000 USDT, with a maximum of 3,000 USDT per person. This prize pool requires trading the specified FRAX, FOGO, or FUN tokens. The event ends on January 28, 2026 at 18:00 (UTC+8).

data.title: Solana Policy Institute: The Roman Storm case is not an isolated incident; calls for stronger legal protections for software developers.
data.description: The Solana Policy Institute stated that the criminal case against Tornado Cash developer Roman Storm is "not an isolated incident" and called on U.S. legislators to establish a clearer legal protection framework for software developers. The institute pointed out that this case has become a key indicator of whether the U.S. still supports open innovation. Although the case has not yet been dropped, there is still hope before sentencing, and the institute called it "the biggest regulatory and even criminal uncertainty" currently facing the U.S. crypto ecosystem. (The Block)

data.title: Amazon bulls say AWS cloud momentum could finally reboot stock sentiment
data.description:
Amazon has been stuck in last place for years. It’s trailed every one of the other six Big Tech giants. But now, the bulls think it might finally have something real behind it. And that something is AWS. The cloud business that used to lead the pack is picking up speed again, thanks to AI. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/amazon-bulls-see-reboot-in-stock-sentiment/

data.title: KindlyMD Rebrands to Nakamoto to Align with Bitcoin Strategy
data.description: KindlyMD, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin treasury company, has officially rebranded as Nakamoto. According to Odaily, the move aims to align the company's image with its long-term strategy within the Bitcoin ecosystem. The rebranding also seeks to clarify the company's objectives and continue supporting plans for Bitcoin's long-term success. Additionally, the company disclosed that it has accumulated approximately 5,400 Bitcoins since implementing its treasury strategy, with a current market value exceeding $500 million.

data.title: Significant BTC and ETH Options Expiry Set for Friday
data.description: A $2.1 billion options expiry for Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) is scheduled for this Friday, according to NS3.AI. The implied volatilities for BTC and ETH are currently at 42% and 56%, respectively, with ETH's implied volatility reaching a yearly low at the 1.1th percentile. Market activity has shown an increase in put buying and bearish spreads for BTC, while ETH is experiencing notable demand for long volatility straddle strategies.

data.title: KindlyMD has changed its name to Nakamoto and disclosed that it holds approximately 5,400 BTC, with a market value exceeding $500 million.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin treasury company KindlyMD has officially changed its name to Nakamoto. This move aims to ensure its corporate image aligns with its long-term strategy within the Bitcoin ecosystem, while also clarifying its goals and continuing to drive initiatives that support Bitcoin's long-term success. The company also disclosed that it has accumulated approximately 5,400 Bitcoins since implementing its Bitcoin treasury strategy, with a current market value exceeding $500 million. (Businesswire)

data.title: Binance Alpha will list SPACECOIN (SPACE) on January 23.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance Alpha will list SPACECOIN (SPACE) on January 23.

data.title: FG Nexus disclosed that it holds 37,594 ETH and has repurchased over $32 million worth of common stock.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Ethereum treasury company FG Nexus disclosed that as of January 20, it held 37,594 ETH, had total outstanding debt of $1.9 million, and 33.6 million outstanding common shares. Furthermore, FG Nexus stated that it had repurchased approximately 9.9 million common shares at an average price of approximately $3.24 per share and approximately 53,000 preferred shares at an average price of approximately $24.16 per share, for a total value exceeding $32 million. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Gate Research: With $2.1 billion in options trading imminent, the cost-effectiveness of long volatility portfolio strategies is increasing.
data.description: According to Gate Research, approximately $2.1 billion worth of BTC and ETH options will be settled this Friday. Currently, the implied volatility (IV) for BTC and ETH is 42% and 56% respectively, with ETH IV falling to an extremely low level at the 1.1% percentile over the past year. Over the past week, the 25-Delta Skew for both BTC and ETH has been significantly negative, with the short-term (7D/30D) declines being the most pronounced, indicating a significant increase in demand for short-term downside hedging through concentrated buying of put options. In terms of block trades, the BTC and ETH options market in the last 24 hours has been dominated by put spreads; the structure is BTC put spread buy 88k/sell 90k (30JAN26-P), with a total volume of approximately 1,115 BTC and net premium income of approximately $730,000. An ETH long volatility straddle strategy was executed, buying 2800-P & 3200-C, with a total trading volume of approximately 5,000 ETH and a net premium expenditure of $2.03 million.

data.title: JustLend DAO's Total Value Locked Surpasses $6.72 Billion
data.description:
The latest weekly report from JustLend DAO, a leading decentralized lending protocol on the TRON network, reveals that the platform's total value locked has exceeded $6.72 billion. According to ChainCatcher, the number of users has also surpassed 480,000.

As a core DeFi infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem, JustLend DAO is demonstrating robust growth in the DeFi market, offering efficient on-chain lending services to users worldwide.

data.title: Solana's Decline Impacts Treasury Holdings Amid Investor Caution
data.description:
Companies holding Solana (SOL) as a treasury asset are experiencing significant unrealized losses following a substantial price decline since January. According to NS3.AI, major holders such as Forward Industries have seen losses surpassing $700 million. Despite these setbacks, Forward Industries remains optimistic about Solana's future, citing an aggressive upgrade roadmap planned for 2026 and record-high staking ratios that bolster network security.

Market activity indicates a pause in SOL accumulation by digital asset treasuries and ETF outflows, reflecting cautious investor sentiment. There is potential downside risk if support levels fall below $120, which could further impact investor confidence.

data.title: JPMorgan CEO Highlights Importance of Federal Reserve's Independence
data.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon emphasized the critical importance of the Federal Reserve's independence. According to Odaily, Dimon also mentioned that he generally does not support tariffs. He expressed concerns that the rapid development of artificial intelligence might be too swift for society to handle. Additionally, Dimon predicted that in five years, the number of jobs in the banking sector will be fewer than today.

data.title: Suzhou's Five-Year Plan to Boost Digital Finance and AI Integration
data.description: Suzhou city government has unveiled its 15th Five-Year Plan, emphasizing the enhancement of its financial service system and the advancement of high-quality digital finance development. According to NS3.AI, the plan seeks to broaden the application of digital Renminbi (RMB) innovations throughout various sectors and regions within the city. Furthermore, it includes initiatives to pilot 'AI + Finance' applications and aims to establish a national digital finance key laboratory.

data.title: State Street Investment Management: The Federal Reserve may cut interest rates three times in 2026.
data.description: State Street Investment Management stated that the Federal Reserve may cut interest rates three times in 2026. (Jinshi)

data.title: OpenAI CEO Addresses Elon Musk's Concerns Over ChatGPT Safety
data.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has responded to U.S. President Donald Trump's concerns about the safety of ChatGPT following Elon Musk's warnings. According to NS3.AI, Musk cited deaths allegedly associated with the AI chatbot, prompting Altman to highlight Musk's hypocrisy by referencing Tesla Autopilot crashes linked to fatalities. Altman emphasized OpenAI's continuous efforts to enhance safety, especially in light of ongoing lawsuits. This exchange highlights the enduring tensions between Altman and Musk, as regulatory scrutiny of AI chatbots intensifies.

data.title: Vietnam launches pilot program for cryptocurrency trading platform licenses
data.description: Vietnam's Ministry of Finance issued a resolution this week to launch a pilot program for formal licensing of cryptocurrency trading platforms, aiming to bring the industry out of a long-standing legal gray area and into the regulatory framework. According to the resolution, the State Securities Commission will be responsible for issuing, adjusting, and revoking operating licenses for cryptocurrency trading platforms, and has published detailed application guidelines. The system requires applicant companies to be Vietnamese companies with a minimum paid-up capital of 10 trillion VND (approximately US$380 million) and to meet stringent standards regarding infrastructure, governance, cybersecurity, and professional staffing. Currently, about 10 securities companies and banks have indicated their intention to enter the market after obtaining licenses. (Cryptonews)

data.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon: Federal Reserve independence is crucial
data.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon stated that the Federal Reserve's independence is crucial, and added that he is generally not a proponent of tariffs. He also noted that the pace of artificial intelligence development may be too fast for society, and that there will be fewer banking jobs in five years than there are now. (Jinshi)
